old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.3","title":"Harden DAO route mutation","description":"Resolve review findings in Rust DAO processing: treat Path Lifetime zero as withdrawal while advancing replay state; remove stale routes when newer topology is incomplete or cyclic; fail closed on malformed or duplicate Target/Transit options and unsupported non-/128 targets; generate RFC-correct circular DAO sequence rollover.","acceptance_criteria":"Independent literal DAO tests prove withdrawal, stale-route invalidation after loops/incomplete chains, immediate malformed-option rejection, duplicate rejection, non-/128 rejection, and 127-\u003e0 generation/replay handling; no route mutation occurs before scope and parse validation; tests, Clippy, and three reviews pass.","status":"open","priority":0,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:47:21.403868Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-17T21:47:21.403868Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2auf.44","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-17T21:47:21.526044Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Implemented RFC-derived fixes with literal regression tests; combined gates pass 99 lichen-rpl tests, 143 lichen-node std tests, RPL all-feature Clippy, formatting, and repeated independent review cycles.
